title: madhuca dasyphylla
intro: Madhuca dasyphylla, also known as the "Butter Tree," is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Madhuca dasyphylla is used in herbal preparations such as tea, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
